mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY next_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_inspection WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_inspection WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 AND next_date < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 AND next_date >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND next_date <= DATEADD(day, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_inspection ( inspection_name, inspection_type, frequency, target_facility, legal_basis, last_date, next_date, assignee, last_result, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{inspectionName}, #{inspectionType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{frequency}, #{targetFacility,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{legalBasis,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{lastDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assignee,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{lastResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_inspection SET inspection_name = #{inspectionName}, inspection_type = #{inspectionType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, frequency = #{frequency}, target_facility = #{targetFacility,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, legal_basis = #{legalBasis,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, last_date = #{lastDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_date = #{nextDate,jdbcType=DATE}, assignee = #{assignee,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, last_result = #{lastResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_inspection SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
